name: Baked Apple Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Core and slice apples into 1/2-inch rings. Place in a shallow baking dish.
3. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients and heat until combined.
4. Pour over apples and bake for 15 minutes or until tender, turning occasionally to baste once or twice.
5. Variation: Very good with red-hot candies placed in the center of each ring.
